advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance and strength. Maintain consistency in your workouts to prepare for the upcoming Rome Half Marathon.
advice.focus: Incorporate more aerobic runs into your weekly routine to enhance endurance.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy aerobic run of 5-7 km at a comfortable pace.
advice.caution: Watch for signs of fatigue due to recent acute load spikes.
